title: Dekton Keychain Cob Light -hanging Hook| 360 Degree Rotation|120 Lumens|5 Modes| Magnetic| Ultra-bright Led Illumination| Multifunctional With Flashlight, Work Light & Emergency Mode| Usb Rechargeable
features: Compact & Ultra-Bright Illumination: The Dekton Keychain COB Light delivers an impressive 120 lumens of ultra-bright LED illumination, ensuring you have clear visibility in any environment. Its compact design makes it an ideal everyday carry (EDC) tool that fits easily in your pocket, backpack, or keychain.

Versatile 5 Lighting Modes: Equipped with 5 distinct lighting modes—High, Medium, Low, Flashlight, and Emergency Strobe—the Dekton COB Light adapts to various situations with ease. Whether you need focused illumination for detailed tasks, a soft glow for close-up work, or an emergency strobe for signaling, this multifunctional light has you covered.

360-Degree Rotation for Maximum Flexibility: The 360-degree rotating design allows you to direct the light exactly where you need it, offering hands-free convenience and maximum flexibility. Whether you're working under the hood, setting up camp, or navigating in the dark, the ability to position the light precisely ensures optimal illumination in any scenario.

Magnetic Base & Hanging Hook for Hands-Free Use: Designed for convenience, this keychain light features a strong magnetic base that securely attaches to metal surfaces, freeing up your hands for other tasks. Additionally, the built-in hanging hook allows you to suspend the light in various positions.

USB Rechargeable & Energy Efficient: Say goodbye to disposable batteries with the Dekton Keychain COB Light’s USB rechargeable design. It offers long-lasting power on a single charge, ensuring the light is always ready when you need it. The energy-efficient LED technology extends battery life, providing consistent brightness and reliability over time.
description: The Dekton Keychain COB Light is a compact yet powerful tool designed to provide versatile illumination in any situation. Featuring an ultra-bright 120-lumen COB LED, this multifunctional light offers exceptional brightness and clarity, making it an essential accessory for both everyday use and emergency situations. Its 360-degree rotation capability ensures complete coverage, allowing you to direct light precisely where you need it, whether you're working in tight spaces, navigating in the dark, or performing detailed tasks. This keychain light is equipped with five lighting modes, including a flashlight, work light, and emergency mode, providing adaptability for a wide range of scenarios. The magnetic base allows for hands-free operation, as it securely attaches to any metal surface, making it ideal for tasks where you need both hands free. Designed for durability and ease of use, the Dekton Keychain COB Light is USB rechargeable, ensuring that you have a reliable source of light whenever you need it. Its compact design makes it easy to carry in your pocket, attach to your keychain, or store in a glove box, while the sturdy construction ensures it can withstand the rigors of daily use. Whether you're using it as a flashlight, work light, or in an emergency, this light is built to perform and provide dependable illumination in any situation. Ideal for outdoor enthusiasts, mechanics, campers, and anyone who values preparedness, the Dekton Keychain COB Light combines functionality, durability, and portability in one sleek design.
